data.acceptance:
1. In All Repositories scope, overview tiles display full knot ids or aliases; in single-repo scope they keep the abbreviated label.
2. The overview includes the expected planning, review, implementation, shipment, and ready-for-review state columns even when a state has no visible beats.
3. Shipped beats are excluded from the overview.
4. Tiles in active states (`planning`, `plan_review`, `implementation`, `implementation_review`, `shipment`, `shipment_review`) surface lease age, provider, model, and version when lease metadata is available.
5. Browser verification confirms desktop and mobile layouts have no page-level horizontal overflow and lease-type beats remain filtered out.
